test.create_query: CREATE TABLE perf_ch_point (p Point) ENGINE = Memory
INSERT INTO perf_ch_point SELECT ( sin(number) * 1000 + cos(number * 7) * 500, cos(number) * 1000 + sin(number * 13) * 500 )::Point FROM numbers_mt(100000) SETTINGS max_insert_threads = 2
CREATE TABLE perf_ch_ring (ring Ring) ENGINE = Memory

INSERT INTO perf_ch_ring SELECT arrayMap(i -> ( toFloat64(number % 1000) + [0, 5, 2.5, 0][i + 1], toFloat64(intDiv(number, 1000)) + [0, 0, 5, 0][i + 1] ), range(4)) FROM numbers_mt(100000) SETTINGS max_insert_threads = 2
CREATE TABLE perf_ch_polygon (polygon Polygon) ENGINE = Memory

INSERT INTO perf_ch_polygon SELECT [arrayMap(i -> ( toFloat64(number % 1000) + [0, 5, 5, 0, 0][i + 1], toFloat64(intDiv(number, 1000)) + [0, 0, 5, 5, 0][i + 1] ), range(5))] FROM numbers_mt(100000) SETTINGS max_insert_threads = 2
CREATE TABLE perf_ch_poly_complex (polygon Polygon) ENGINE = Memory

INSERT INTO perf_ch_poly_complex SELECT [arrayMap(i -> ( toFloat64(number % 500) + cos(i / 90.0 * pi()) * (1 + number % 10), toFloat64(intDiv(number, 500)) + sin(i / 90.0 * pi()) * (1 + number % 10) ), range(180))] FROM numbers_mt(100000) SETTINGS max_insert_threads = 2
CREATE TABLE perf_ch_mpoly (mpoly MultiPolygon) ENGINE = Memory

INSERT INTO perf_ch_mpoly SELECT [[arrayMap(i -> ( toFloat64(number % 1000) + [0, 5, 5, 0, 0][i + 1], toFloat64(intDiv(number, 1000)) + [0, 0, 5, 5, 0][i + 1] ), range(5))]] FROM numbers_mt(100000) SETTINGS max_insert_threads = 2
CREATE TABLE perf_ch_linestring (ls String) ENGINE = Memory

INSERT INTO perf_ch_linestring SELECT concat( 'LINESTRING (', toString(number % 1000), ' ', toString(intDiv(number, 1000)), ', ', toString(number % 1000 + 5), ' ', toString(intDiv(number, 1000)), ', ', toString(number % 1000 + 5), ' ', toString(intDiv(number, 1000) + 5), ')' ) FROM numbers_mt(50000) SETTINGS max_insert_threads = 2
CREATE TABLE perf_ch_mlinestring (mls String) ENGINE = Memory

INSERT INTO perf_ch_mlinestring SELECT concat( 'MULTILINESTRING ((', toString(number % 1000), ' ', toString(intDiv(number, 1000)), ', ', toString(number % 1000 + 5), ' ', toString(intDiv(number, 1000)), '), (', toString(number % 1000), ' ', toString(intDiv(number, 1000) + 5), ', ', toString(number % 1000 + 5), ' ', toString(intDiv(number, 1000) + 5), '))' ) FROM numbers_mt(50000) SETTINGS max_insert_threads = 2
CREATE TABLE perf_ch_point_grouped (grp UInt32, p Point) ENGINE = Memory
INSERT INTO perf_ch_point_grouped SELECT number % 1000 AS grp, (sin(number) * 1000, cos(number) * 1000)::Point AS p FROM numbers_mt(100000) SETTINGS max_insert_threads = 2
CREATE TABLE perf_ch_poly_grouped (grp UInt32, polygon Polygon) ENGINE = Memory

INSERT INTO perf_ch_poly_grouped SELECT number % 1000 AS grp, [arrayMap(i -> ( toFloat64(number % 1000) + [0, 5, 5, 0, 0][i + 1], toFloat64(intDiv(number, 1000)) + [0, 0, 5, 5, 0][i + 1] ), range(5))] FROM numbers_mt(100000) SETTINGS max_insert_threads = 2
CREATE TABLE perf_ch_point_grouped_10 (grp UInt32, p Point) ENGINE = Memory

INSERT INTO perf_ch_point_grouped_10 SELECT number % 10 AS grp, (sin(number) * 1000 + cos(number * 7) * 500, cos(number) * 1000 + sin(number * 13) * 500)::Point AS p FROM numbers_mt(100000) SETTINGS max_insert_threads = 2
test.query: SELECT groupConvexHull(p) FROM perf_ch_point FORMAT Null
SELECT groupConvexHull(ring) FROM perf_ch_ring FORMAT Null
SELECT groupConvexHull(polygon) FROM perf_ch_polygon FORMAT Null
SELECT groupConvexHull(polygon) FROM perf_ch_poly_complex FORMAT Null
SELECT groupConvexHull(mpoly) FROM perf_ch_mpoly FORMAT Null
SELECT groupConvexHull(readWKTLineString(ls)) FROM perf_ch_linestring FORMAT Null
SELECT grp, groupConvexHull(p) FROM perf_ch_point_grouped GROUP BY grp FORMAT Null
SELECT grp, groupConvexHull(p) FROM perf_ch_point_grouped_10 GROUP BY grp FORMAT Null
SELECT grp, groupConvexHull(polygon) FROM perf_ch_poly_grouped GROUP BY grp FORMAT Null
SELECT groupConvexHull(p, 1) FROM perf_ch_point FORMAT Null
SELECT groupConvexHull(p, 0) FROM perf_ch_point FORMAT Null
SELECT groupConvexHull(ring, 0) FROM perf_ch_ring FORMAT Null
SELECT groupConvexHull(polygon, 0) FROM perf_ch_polygon FORMAT Null
SELECT groupConvexHull(polygon, 0) FROM perf_ch_poly_complex FORMAT Null
SELECT groupConvexHull(mpoly, 0) FROM perf_ch_mpoly FORMAT Null
SELECT grp, groupConvexHull(p, 0) FROM perf_ch_point_grouped GROUP BY grp FORMAT Null
SELECT grp, groupConvexHull(p, 0) FROM perf_ch_point_grouped_10 GROUP BY grp FORMAT Null
